data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for package delivery photo capture.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for photo capture at delivery points, as specified in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to the implementation of this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for photo capture, but there is no direct evidence showing that this requirement has been satisfied in the current saga run, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of photo capture functionality at delivery points.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
